name: ttv-smartreader
description: TTV / SmartReader desktop app for TTS, STT, and text import flows
author: Roman

scripts.check:js: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer.js
scripts.check:python-imports: python -c "import stt_server, tts_server; print('python imports ok')"
scripts.ci: npm run check:js && npm run check:python && npm run check:python-imports && npm run check:pdf-import && npm run check:youtube-import
